attributes.content:
## Overview

The Time Machine card gives the workspace a structured home for version history browser: navigate card state through time with visual diff.

As a first-class Boxel card, it can be linked to adjacent records, surfaced in filtered views, and reused in automation without the information collapsing into disconnected notes or one-off documents.

## Core Mechanics

Time Machine acts as the canonical record for this concept in the workspace. Its fields capture the facts that need to stay structured, while computed state and relationships make it easy to search, group, and reuse across the system.

The card can be created directly by a user, produced from a [[Workflow Playbook]], or updated in response to a [[Trigger]]. When AI is involved, a [[Prompt Template]] or [[Skill Card]] can shape how it is drafted, summarized, classified, or routed.

## Integration Points

- **[[Trigger]]** -- Changes to Time Machine can fire automation, and automation can also create or update Time Machine.
- **[[Task]]** -- Time Machine often creates follow-up work or is itself tracked through task execution.
- **[[Workflow Playbook]]** -- Time Machine can be created, reviewed, or progressed as one step inside a repeatable workflow.
- **[[Report]]** -- Time Machine can feed rollups and summaries that surface trends, status, or outcomes.
- **[[Document]]** -- Time Machine can link to longer-form supporting content when a lightweight card needs deeper context.
- **[[Image Search]]** -- Image Search can provide adjacent context, downstream output, or grouped navigation around Time Machine.

## Example Use Cases

- **System of record:** Teams create Time Machine as the structured home for version history browser: navigate card state through time with visual diff and keep related work linked instead of scattered across notes.
- **Automation handoff:** A [[Workflow Playbook]] or [[Trigger]] creates or updates Time Machine when upstream conditions are met, reducing repetitive setup work.
- **Search and reporting:** Time Machine stays queryable for dashboards, summaries, and downstream actions without re-entering the same information in multiple places.
